body:
Soft links are not like hard links or folders. Sometimes, they are treated differently by the operating system (and Julia). As a result, for some operations, an extra step is required to work with the output produced by the ActiveStyle in OutputPathGenerator.

This PR changes the returned path to be the newly created folder instead of the link. The link is still being created and managed, which means that users can still assume that their output can always be found in `output_active`, but the path that is presented to Julia code that uses `OutputPathGenerator` is now the path of the newly created folder. This has the advantage that the path is a normal folder, possibly simplifying certain operations.
title: Change ActiveLinkStyle to return the folder instead of link
